visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown puffer jacket, a black choker, and a pleated brown skirt, stands in the center of a supermarket aisle. Above her, a large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is superimposed. To her left, a large graphic of a bunch of asparagus is visible. She gestures with her hands as she speaks directly to the camera. The background consists of tall glass-fronted freezer cases filled with various products. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a large retail environment. (2) The camera zooms into the interior of a freezer. Multiple green bags of 'Veggie Maria' brand frozen green asparagus are stacked neatly on shelves. A white price tag displays the number '$319' in large black text. The packaging is vibrant green and white. (3) The shot cuts back to the woman in the aisle. She points toward the freezer case while holding a yellow container in her left hand. Her facial expression is expressive and animated, showing excitement. In the background, other shoppers are visible as blurred figures moving through the brightly lit warehouse space. (4) Close-up on the woman's face as she explains the product. She has clear skin and wears subtle makeup. Her movements are energetic, involving frequent hand-waving and shifting of her weight. The camera is handheld, resulting in slight, natural movement. (5) Another cut to the frozen asparagus shelves, specifically highlighting the price tag and the arrangement of the green bags. (6) The woman returns to the frame, continuing her presentation. She gives a thumbs-up gesture and later brushes her hair behind her ear. As the video nears its end, she waves goodbye to the camera while smiling warmly. The environment remains consistent with the warehouse supermarket setting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 隱藏特價. [Variety]: 冷凍蘆筍偷偷降價. [Subtitle]: 來跟大家說. (2) [Subtitle]: 我們來到找到一個隱藏特價的東西. (3) [Subtitle]: 偷偷特價 不告訴你啊. (4) [Subtitle]: 原價329. (5) [Subtitle]: 哇 折了10塊錢. (6) [Subtitle]: 哇 折了10元 妹妹好開心. (7) [Subtitle]: 年初是賣339元. (8) [Subtitle]: 喔 年初339元 總而言之呢 現在 11月 319元. (9) [Subtitle]: 目前已經跌價20塊哦. (10) [Variety]: 好值得. [Subtitle]: 喔 好值得哦. (11) [Subtitle]: 因為這個東西是不可能特價的. (12) [Subtitle]: 所以這個時候 隱藏降價的時候趕快買. (13) [Subtitle]: 妹妹超喜歡. (14) [Subtitle]: 這蘆筍都拿來做什麼. (15) [Subtitle]: 可以微波 也可以水煮. (16) [Subtitle]: 也可以拿來炒. (17) [Subtitle]: 他微波超級快. (18) [Subtitle]: 做水煮也方便. (19) [Subtitle]: 不會有人做蘆筍汁. (20) [Subtitle]: 總而言之 他終於默默特價了. (21) [Subtitle]: 而且他不告訴你 不打任何的標籤. (22) [Subtitle]: 他比好市多自己賣的那個生鮮蘆筍還好. (23) [Subtitle]: 那個生鮮蘆筍梗很粗 你要自己削. (24) [Subtitle]: 這個全部都可以吃. (25) [Subtitle]: 對 很細很嫩 真的很好吃. (26) [Subtitle]: 加上檸檬汁也好吃. (27) [Subtitle]: 只有看我們影片的人才知道. (28) [Subtitle]: 天天五蔬果 趕快來買. (29) [Subtitle]: 所以要追蹤可可酒精喔~

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character, 1 male cameraman (hand visible briefly), and at least 2 shoppers in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a brown quilted puffer jacket, a black dress/top with a choker, and a pleated long skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with industrial shelving, large freezer units with glass doors, and fluorescent lighting. Shoppers and carts are visible in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in a cheerful, energetic tone in Mandarin Chinese, introducing a 'hidden' deal. The speech rate is fast and enthusiastic. A high-tempo, major-mode electronic BGM plays in the background with a steady 4/4 beat. Ambient supermarket murmurs are faintly audible. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' transition SFX marks the switch in focus. The female voice continues her rapid-fire narration, while a male voice responds off-camera with a surprised exclamation ('Wa!'). The music maintains its energetic, bright texture. (3) Multiple 'ding' or 'pop' sound effects occur, coinciding with the appearance of text on screen. The female narrator discusses price details, her voice exhibiting high pitch variability and positive valence. The BGM remains consistent in volume and energy. (4) The female narrator describes ways to prepare the product (microwave, boil, stir-fry). Her articulation is clear and professional. The interplay between the active narration and the rhythmic electronic track creates a sense of urgency and excitement. (5) As the video concludes, the music swells slightly and then fades out as the female speaker invites viewers to follow her channel. The final vocal delivery is soft and friendly, accompanied by a final synthesized chime.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to inform viewers about a 'secret' price drop on frozen green asparagus at Costco. The creator uses high-energy delivery and on-site evidence (price tags, product shelves) to convince shoppers of the value, emphasizing ease of preparation and superior quality compared to fresh alternatives to encourage immediate purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product promotion, price comparison, and usage tips for a specific brand (Veggie Maria) within a specific store (Costco).

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video follows standard social media 'deal-finding' vlog tropes, utilizing fast cuts, bright captions, and high-energy narration to maintain engagement.
